data.body: TS4 (b134) DOCS DONE + folded. Plan PASS+signed after 3 rounds (INDETERMINATE->set file_impact; BLOCK: AC2 missing 'no old language' constraint + field-naming precision; fixed). Rewrote docs/identity.md + docs/adr/0045 to approved design (in-toto Statement, git-commit-ancestry validity + DAG-vs-HLC rationale, ledger {event_uuid,content_hash,signature,signer_pubkey,position:{commit_sha,position}}, verify-authorship verdict vocabulary incl key_not_valid_at_era, create_placeholder). Verified NO diverged language remains; docs-index gate exit 0; make lint clean. Folded into 4b5b -> 4b5b'=0ca602f62 (change 581, Change-Id I382d47d3 preserved, rebar-ticket->b134). ALL 4 TRANSITIONS FOLDED: bde5'(561 TS1), e165'(563 TS2), 3183'(580 TS3), 4b5b'(581 TS4). NEXT: rebase stack onto current origin/main (02d4da346; no file overlap=conflict-free; needed for CI freshness + FFO), full pre-flight, push to gerrit, close tickets bottom-up as CI Verified+1, re-run epic completion-verifier, land.
